primary_contract: nwau_py.abstraction_doctrine shared abstraction doctrine and reviewable metadata-only boundary guardrails for kernels, bundles, registries, adapters, bindings, apps, docs, and releases
completion_evidence: developer guidance for canonical formula, parameter, mapping, grouper, binding, and app locations
licensing_caveats: Do not encode proprietary or undisclosed crosswalks, fee schedules, or source tables into the doctrine, tests, or examples unless the source license explicitly permits it.
Treat compatibility shims as transitional exceptions, not the intended architecture.
Keep any licensed classifier or grouper artifacts out of the repository unless they are synthetic, local-only, or otherwise redistributable.
evidence_surfaces: roadmap and contributor docs that point back to the doctrine
description: Make the project's abstraction doctrine explicit, reviewable, and enforceable across calculators, coding sets, groupers, bindings, docs, and apps.
